case_title: DENNIS CHAPMAN VS. STUMBLIN ALONG LLC A WEST VIRGINA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAPMAN, DENNIS AS TO DEFENDANT STUMBLIN ALONG LLC A WEST VIRGINA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAPMAN, DENNIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STUMBLIN ALONG LLC A WEST VIRGINA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $4,882.19 PRINCIPAL, $6.82 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,089.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
